article.description: — Kevin Durant scored 39 points and made a season-best six 3-pointers to lead the Houston Rockets to a 110-105 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves Friday night.
article.headline: Kevin Durant's season-high 39 points and clutch free throws lift Rockets over Timberwolves

images.caption: Kevin Durant joins "SportsCenter" to explain how he and his teammates reciprocate each other's energy.
images.name: KD makes it clear that he still brings the energy

article.linkText: Kevin Durant's season-high 39 points and clutch free throws lift Rockets over Timberwolves
article.story: HOUSTON -- — Kevin Durant scored 39 points and made a season-best six 3-pointers to lead the Houston Rockets to a 110-105 win over the Minnesota Timberwolves Friday night. Alperen Sengun added 25 points with 14 rebounds to help the Rockets bounce back after a blowout loss to Oklahoma City Thursday night. A 6-2 run by the Timberwolves, with four points from Julius Randle, got them within 105-102 with about 90 seconds to go. Sengun fouled out soon after that and Jaden McDaniels made one of two free throws to get Minnesota within two points. Durant made two free throws with under a minute left before Randle turned the ball over and Durant was fouled again. He made two more free throws with 22.1 seconds left to seal the victory. Durant’s big shooting night came after he was 0 for 5 on 3-pointers against the Thunder. Randle had season-high 39 points for the Timberwolves on a night when Anthony Edwards missed a second straight game with a foot issue. The Timberwolves trailed by six points after a basket by Bones Hyland before Rudy Gobert missed a chance to close the gap by missing three of his next four free throws. Houston remained up by 5 later in the fourth, but a dunk by Sengun extended the lead to 103-96 with 3½ minutes left. Neither team shot well from the free throw line, with Houston making just 20 of 34 and Minnesota going 20 for 35. Gobert had the worst night, going 2 for 10 on free throws. Naz Reid added 25 points with 10 rebounds off the bench for the Timberwolves, who scored at least 100 points in their 100th straight game, which is the third-longest such streak in NBA history. Up next Timberwolves: Visit San Antonio on Saturday night. Rockets: Host New Orleans on Sunday night. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.caption: The Knicks are now heavy favorites to win the Eastern Conference after taking a 3-0 series lead over the Cavs.

images.name: OKC Thunder [1296x729]

images.caption: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and the Thunder enter the playoffs as the favorites to win it all.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics dribbles the ball during the game against the New York Knicks on April 9, 2026 at Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York.
images.caption: Jayson Tatum averaged 21.8 PPG in 16 regular-season games leading up to the playoffs.
images.credit: Nathaniel S. Butler/NBAE via Getty Images
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers guard Austin Reaves (15) shoots over Minnesota Timberwolves center Naz Reid (11) during game 5 of the first round of the NBA Western Conference Playoffs between the Minnesota Timberwolves and the Los Angeles Lakers on April 30, 2025.
images.caption: The Lakers miss the perimeter shooting that Austin Reaves provides.
images.name: Austin Reaves [1296x729]

images.alt: Luka Doncic #77 of the Los Angeles Lakers handles the ball during the game against the Miami Heat on March 19, 2026 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida.
images.caption: The Lakers' championship odds are on the move again after Luka Doncic's injury.
images.name: Luka Doncic [1296x729]

images.alt: Los Angeles Lakers forward LeBron James (23) scores on a breakaway dunk during the first half of an NBA basketball game against the Orlando Magic, Saturday, March 21, 2026, in Orlando, Fla.
images.caption: LeBron James and the Lakers are on a roll as March winds down.
images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Cade Cunningham #2 of the Detroit Pistons handles the ball during the game against the Denver Nuggets on February 3, 2026 at Little Caesars Arena in Detroit, Michigan.
images.name: Cade Cunningham [1296x729]

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.
images.name: Jaylen Brown [1296x729]

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.
images.caption: Jamal Murray has led the Nuggets while Nikola Jokic recovers from injury.
images.name: Jamal Murray  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the Cleveland Cavaliers on December 29, 2025 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs have seen their odds to win the NBA championship shorten in the past week.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

videos.description: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights
videos.headline: Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Minnesota Timberwolves vs. Houston Rockets: Game Highlights) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Rudy Gobert throws a lead pass to Julius Randle who throws it down.
videos.headline: Julius Randle slams it strong for Minnesota

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Julius Randle slams it strong for Minnesota) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Reed Sheppard drains a catch-and-shoot 3-pointer for the Rockets.
videos.headline: Reed Sheppard rattles in a 3

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Reed Sheppard rattles in a 3) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant hits a tough jumper while falling to the ground.
videos.headline: KD fades away for a Rockets and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD fades away for a Rockets and-1) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant gets an easy transition bucket for the Rockets.
videos.headline: KD lays it high off the glass for Houston

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD lays it high off the glass for Houston) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant makes a 3-pointer just before halftime for the Rockets.
videos.headline: KD swishes a corner 3 to close the 1st half

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD swishes a corner 3 to close the 1st half) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Jabari Smith Jr. with the massive block at the rim
videos.headline: Jabari Smith Jr. with the massive block at the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jabari Smith Jr. with the massive block at the rim) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun catches a nice feed from Kevin Durant and puts it in the basket for Houston.
videos.headline: Alperen Sengun muscles in a Rockets and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alperen Sengun muscles in a Rockets and-1) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Jaden McDaniels makes an impressive defensive play and gets the ball ahead to Julius Randle for a Timberwolves and-1.
videos.headline: Jaden McDaniels leaps to block KD's jumper

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jaden McDaniels leaps to block KD's jumper) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun tumbles as Julius Randle takes it inside for the Timberwolves.
videos.headline: Julius Randle bullies Alperen Sengun for a dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Julius Randle bullies Alperen Sengun for a dunk) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun rises in the air and finishes through contact for the Rockets.
videos.headline: Alperen Sengun switches hands midair for a Houston and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Alperen Sengun switches hands midair for a Houston and-1) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Anthony Edwards walks up to Kevin Durant to chat during a game break between the Timberwolves and Rockets.
videos.headline: KD and Ant meetup to share a laugh

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD and Ant meetup to share a laugh) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Alpreren Sengun slyly passes it to an open Amen Thompson, who slams it in for the Rockets.
videos.headline: Sengun slips it behind the back for a Thompson flush

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Sengun slips it behind the back for a Thompson flush) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Alperen Sengun dives for a loose ball, which starts the break for the Rockets and leads to a Jabari Smith Jr. dunk.
videos.headline: Rockets' hustle leads to a fast-break dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Rockets' hustle leads to a fast-break dunk) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant pushes the ball up the court past defenders for a one-handed dunk.
videos.headline: KD jams it in for the Rockets

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD jams it in for the Rockets) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Kevin Durant rises and hits a 3-pointer over Naz Reid for the Rockets.
videos.headline: KD drains it from downtown

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (KD drains it from downtown) 2026/01/17 ESHEET

videos.description: Amen Thompson steals the ball and dishes it to Alperen Sengun under the basket for Houston.
videos.headline: Amen Thompson feeds Alperen Sengun for an open dunk

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Amen Thompson feeds Alperen Sengun for an open dunk) 2026/01/17 ESHEET
